description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow for linting and unit testing C++ code. The workflow should trigger on pull requests to specific branches and allow manual triggering. It should have multiple jobs for linting C++ code, testing rdsn with different configurations (Release, ASAN, LSAN, UBSAN), and testing Pegasus. Each job should run in an ubuntu-latest environment with a specific container image and perform steps such as checking out code, running clang-format, building and testing code, and packaging server and tools.
